text: Margherita Pizza: Classic tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, and basil. Small $12, Medium $16, Large $20. Gluten-free crust available for $3 extra.
Pepperoni Pizza: Tomato sauce, mozzarella, and premium pepperoni. Small $14, Medium $18, Large $23. Our best seller.
BBQ Chicken Pizza: Smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onion, and mozzarella. Small $15, Medium $19, Large $24.
Sides and extras: Garlic bread $4, Caesar salad $7, Buffalo wings (8 pieces) $10, Tiramisu $6, Soft drinks $2.50.
Extra toppings $1.50 each: mushrooms, bell peppers, olives, jalapeños, sun-dried tomatoes, anchovies, caramelized onions, roasted garlic, spinach, artichoke hearts.
Opening hours: Monday to Thursday 11am–10pm, Friday and Saturday 11am–11pm, Sunday 12pm–9pm. We are closed on Thanksgiving and Christmas Day.

Delivery is available within a 5-mile radius. Delivery fee $2.99 for orders under $30, free delivery for orders $30 and above. Average delivery time 30–45 minutes. We also partner with DoorDash and Uber Eats.
Weekly specials: Two-for-Tuesday — buy any large pizza, get a medium 50% off. Family Friday deal — two large pizzas, a side salad, and four drinks for $49.99. Loyalty card: every 10th pizza free.
We are located at 142 Napoli Street, Brooklyn, NY 11201. Free parking available in the lot behind the restaurant. Nearest subway stop: Jay Street–MetroTech (A, C, F lines).
How to order: Call us at (718) 555-0192, order online at luigispizzeria.com, or walk in. Online orders require a minimum of $15. We accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, and cash.
